title: Influential Parameters for the Analysis of Intracellular Parasite Metabolomics.
author: Carey MA Covelli V Brown A Medlock GL Haaren M Cooper JG Papin JA Guler JL
content: S-EPMC5907652 PMC5907652 Influential Parameters for the Analysis of Intracellular Parasite Metabolomics. Metabolomics is increasingly popular for the study of pathogens. For the malaria parasite Plasmodium falciparum, both targeted and untargeted metabolomics have improved our understanding
